text: Marge, I'm afraid your days of walking are over.
Oh, my god!
For about 36 hours.
By then, this mild ankle sprain should be good as new.
It's my fault. Homie wouldn't have dropped me if I
hadn't put on a few pounds.
Nonsense.
It's not your fault you're married to a--
this.
[groans] And it was such a good date night.
Well, now it's a hernia morning.
See, you've got a tear in your abdominal wall
and a section of your intestine has pushed through.
Aren't you going to chuckle?
An inguinal hernia is no laughing matter.
[laughs] Inguinal.
Will I need surgery?
Possibly, but don't be alarmed.
It's just him scalpel work around your scrotum.
Oh-oh!
